summary: A Fox & Friends Weekend news segment with anchors and a DHS-supplied photo of an alleged MS-13 member, reporting the DOJ placed an attorney on leave and criticizing media framing. It is a TV news package, not a stylized or music-driven produced piece, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: DOJ PLACES ATTORNEY ON LEAVE AFTER HE ARGUED TO RETURN ACCUSED MS-13 SUSPECT; JUDGE TO TRUMP ADMIN: RETURN MISTAKENLY DEPORTED MIGRANT; WH SLAMS ORDER TO FLY ALLEGED MS-13 MEMBER BACK TO U.S.; FOX & FRIENDS WEEKEND
